hero.title: Facilities & Project Management
hero.subtitle: A single point of contact for your workplace operations.
hero.description: Kirk & Kirk offers a complete, boutique facilities management service — from the daily running of your workplace to managing projects from inception to completion. One point of contact, total accountability, no loose ends.

overview.heading: Your Operations, Our Expertise
overview.description: Managing a workplace involves hundreds of moving parts — maintenance, contractors, compliance, budgets, and projects competing for attention. Our facilities and project management service takes that complexity off your plate, delivering a professional, responsive service that keeps your operations running smoothly.

features.title: Facilities Management
features.description: Day-to-day management of your premises including planned preventative maintenance, contractor management, and compliance tracking.

features.title: Project Management
features.description: End-to-end management of refurbishment, fit-out, and construction projects — from brief and budget through to handover and defects.

features.title: Contractor Procurement
features.description: Sourcing, vetting, and managing specialist contractors and suppliers, ensuring quality, compliance, and value for money.

steps.title: Needs Assessment
steps.description: Understanding your operational requirements, existing contracts, budget parameters, and pain points to design a tailored management plan.

steps.title: Service Design
steps.description: Building a bespoke facilities or project management framework with clear scope, KPIs, reporting structures, and escalation procedures.

steps.title: Delivery & Reporting
steps.description: Ongoing management with regular reporting, budget tracking, and continuous improvement to ensure your operations perform at their best.

cta.heading: Simplify Your Operations
cta.description: Let us handle the complexity of running your workplace. From daily facilities management to major projects, we've got it covered.
